creator: john.pineau@linearlogic.com
text:
Attached is debug output using 6.2-STABLE. I'm not a programmer, but it looks like its happening in the bge driver (to me at least).

Hardware is an HP DL320-G5. This has been reproduced in 6.2-STABLE using both GENERIC and SMP, AMD64 and i386.

6.2-RELEASE has no issue on any architecture. Any assistance would be appreciated.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Compile 62-STABLE from 62-RELEASE on DL320-G5. i386 and AMD64 tested, SMP and GENERIC
